expectations.evidence: Note at end says 'Plan was NOT actually saved to .prism/shared/plans/ since this is a simulation.' Path mentioned: .prism/shared/plans/2026-03-08-test-results-dashboard.md but not actually saved.

expectations.text: Success criteria are split into Automated Verification and Manual Verification sections
expectations.evidence: Plan has 'Automated Verification' (go test, go build, golangci-lint) and 'Manual Verification' (6 manual checks) as separate sections.

expectations.text: Each phase includes specific file paths and verification commands
expectations.evidence: All 6 phases include file tables with specific paths and Verification sections with bash commands (e.g., 'cd cmd/prism-cli && go test ./domain/ -run TestParse -v').

expectations.text: A 'What We Are NOT Doing' scope section is included
expectations.evidence: 'Out of Scope' section lists 5 excluded items: code coverage, test history, non-Go runners, debugging, parallel test management.

expectations.text: Risks and mitigations section is present
expectations.evidence: 'Risks & Mitigations' table with 4 risks including likelihood, impact, and mitigation columns.

expectations.text: TodoWrite is used to track phases
expectations.evidence: No mention of TodoWrite being used anywhere in the transcript. Plan has a Progress Log table but TodoWrite tool was not invoked.
